S.reason: Essential for controlling the large B site and cutting off long sightlines with her wall.
Her global presence and gravity well are perfect for the complex mid layout and narrow corridors.

A.reason: Excellent for taking vertical positions in Mid and B site.
Her prowlers are great for clearing the many corners in Mid and A site.
Strong defensive holds on A site and flank watching.

B.reason: Good for clearing small rooms, but lacks the global control needed for Pearl's scale.
Useful for info, but Fade's utility is often more effective in Pearl's tight corridors.

Attack.summary: Focus on B Long control or Mid pressure to split the defenders. Pearl favors slow, methodical takes.

keyPositions.label: B Long
keyPositions.description: Crucial area to control for B site takes. Use smokes to cross.

keyPositions.label: Mid Plaza
keyPositions.description: The heart of the map. Control this to rotate quickly.

utility.description: Wall across B Site to block Heaven and Connector.
Flash out of A Main to clear site corners.

tips: Always watch the flank from Mid when pushing sites.
B site is very long-range; consider Snipers or Guardian.
Use utility to clear 'Art' area in Mid before pushing A.

Defence.summary: Hold B Long with a sniper and use utility to stall Mid. A site is easier to retake than B.

keyPositions.label: B Heaven
keyPositions.description: Power position for snipers holding B Long.

keyPositions.label: A Flowers
keyPositions.description: Good defensive spot for holding A Main.

utility.description: Alarmbot in Mid to catch late lurkers.
Orb on B Long to stall the execute.

tips: Don't give up Mid control for free; it's too vital.
Retaking B is very hard if the spike is planted for B Long.
Communicate Art and Mid Link rotations early.

S.reason: Absolutely essential for cutting off long sightlines on this massive map.
Operator usage is key on Breeze, and Jett is the best for it.

A.reason: Long range recon is very powerful.
Great for holding long angles with his Headhunter and Op.

Attack.summary: Use Viper wall to slice sites. Control Mid for rotations.

Defence.summary: Hold long angles. Use Viper wall to deny info.
tips: Play for retake if they rush.
Use Operator on A or B main.

S.reason: Toxic screen is vital for the open areas.
Flexible smokes for the verticality of the map.

A.reason: Great for clearing the tight corners in the castle area.

Attack.summary: Control the high ground. Use utility to clear corners.
tips: Watch out for the salt flats.

Defence.summary: Hold the high ground. Don't get flanked.

S.reason: Grenades and Satchels are perfect for the tight chokes.
Wall is great for Mid control.

Attack.summary: Mid control is essential to split the defenders.

Defence.summary: Hold Mid. Stall pushes with utility.

S.reason: Great for one-ways and flexible smokes.

Attack.summary: Watch your step! Use utility to clear angles.

S.reason: Smokes and molly are great for execution.
Stuns and flashes are great for the three sites.

Attack.summary: Probing attacks. Rotate to weak site.
